title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Simplilearn - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Simplilearn - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Simplilearn, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Simplilearn:
Simplilearn is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Simplilearn!
